googletranslate-desc: Ku dar badhan lagu turjumo bogga hadda jira adigoo adeegsanaya Google Translate
googletranslate-htmlpurifier-error: Extension:GoogleTranslate waxay u baahan tahay Extension:HTMLPurifier si loo kaydiyo turjumaadaha si ammaan ah.
apihelp-googletranslatesave-summary: Kaydi turjumaadaha lagu sameeyay Google Translate
